text: Moving from the sterile, glass-encased emptiness of one room, in the quiet before creation, to this brightly colored, almost celebratory display of knowledge and innovation, I feel a shift within myself—like stepping between realities. Here, surrounded by words and bold visuals, I feel energized yet contemplative, drawn to the interplay between research, development, and the future. What does it mean to be both observer and participant in the forging of new ideas?
